description: Fragment of a legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–38 CE). Involves a supervisor of construction (al-mutawallī lil-ʿimāra); something valued at 5 dinars; Abū ʿAlī Ibn al-Sukkarī; "the return of al-Rayyis (Maṣliaḥ Gaʾon?) to Egypt in these days"; bringing 23.25 dinars as a donation; a certain Abū ʿAlī; and the heirs of Abū l-Faḍl b. Raḥ[mūn?]. AA/ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
